method: Generated single source of truth. Website pages display this JSON and do not calculate separate bullpen scores in the browser.
note: v5: fatigue is recency-weighted workload (rest days lower it), efficiency is ERA and WHIP, risk_index blends the two. Reliever counts are context only.
formula: Fatigue = 45 + (recency-weighted relief innings above 3/game x 4.2) + (recency-weighted back-to-back arms x 8). Half-life 2 days, so an idle or rained-out day lowers fatigue. Runs allowed live in the efficiency score.

teams.label: High risk
teams.workload_read: Heavy recent workload. Late-game pitching condition could materially affect the read.
teams.score_reason: High risk (9.3/10): 18.7 recent relief innings, recency-weighted — 8 in the last game (pitched yesterday), 3 arms worked back-to-back days. Recent innings count more; rest days lower the score. Workload only — see efficiency for how well the pen has pitched.
teams.formula: 45 + (recency-weighted (BP IP - 3/game) x 4.2) + (recency-weighted back-to-back arms x 8). Each game decays by half every 2 days, so rest days lower the score.
teams.efficiency_reason: Struggling (1.9/10): 7.23 ERA and 2.14 WHIP over 18.7 relief innings (15 ER, 22 H, 18 BB) in the last three days.
teams.efficiency_formula: 50 - clamp((ERA - 4.20) x 6, -25, 25) x confidence - clamp((WHIP - 1.30) x 15, -20, 20) x confidence, confidence = clamp(BP IP / 6, 0.35, 1)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.
